addons.releaseNotes: v1.3.4: Sidebar icon now uses an inline lucide Sparkles SVG (h-5 w-5, stroke 2) so it visually matches the rest of the menu — was rendering as a small emoji 📄 before. Bundles v1.3.3's smaller chunks + 90s timeout, v1.3.2's model-ID fixes, and v1.3.1's pdfjs-dist 4.x downgrade.

addons.name: TR PDF Converter
addons.description: Native Trade Republic PDF parser — extracts cash, MMF, trading P&L, crypto (BTC/ETH/XRP/SOL with TR's pseudo-ISINs). Direct one-click import to Donkeyfolio activities (auto-creates TR account, extracts quantity + unit price + €1 fee for manual trades, €0 for savings plans). Crypto staking rewards classified as INTEREST + STAKING_REWARD subtype. Cash flows emit qty=1, unitPrice=amount per Donkeyfolio wizard convention. Supports DE/EN/PT TR statements. Format-aware number parsing (US & EU). Auto-recovery for broken rows. Ported from jcmpagel's open-source code.
addons.author: Donkeyfolio
addons.releaseNotes: v2.5.1: CRITICAL fix to fractional-share quantity parsing. The format-aware parser was treating any 'X.YYY' with exactly 3 digits after the dot as EU thousands separator — so 'quantity: 0.384' (a real ASML fractional sell) was parsing as 384 instead of 0.384. ASML showed Net qty -380 and the realized P&L showed -€13,785 because of this. New rule: when integer part is just '0' (or all zeros), NEVER treat as thousands; always US decimal. Also bundles v2.5.0's running-average-cost P&L and import hints (instrumentType, quoteCcy).
